deviations.what: The four buttons announce the pressed button's type+text to the sap.ui.core.InvisibleMessage a11y service and echo it into the status Text; here a press updates the bound status Text with a generic confirmation (the a11y live-region announce and the per-button identity are not reproduced server-side). The original's 'Infromation' button-text typo is kept 1:1.
